title: Tradable Music Discs!
description: Makes music discs buyable and sellable from villagers!
body:
![Tradable Music Discs By Deinowharf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d4fdd3c76fe0b86850f81b4b8a0a0767aaa8aae.png)

# **Mod Description**
This mod makes all the music discs buyable and sellable. You can buy each music discs from different professions of villagers. 

 

# **Trades**
Armorer - Cat 8 emeralds

Butcher - Blocks 8 emeralds

Cartographer - Chirp 8 emeralds

Cleric - Far 8 emeralds

Farmer - Mall 8 emeralds

Fishermen - Mellohi 8 emeralds

Fletchers - Stal 8 emeralds

Leatherworkers - Strad 8 emeralds

Librarians - Ward 8 emeralds

Masons - Wait 8 emeralds

Shepherds - Otherside 8 emeralds

Toolssmith - Pigstep 12 emeralds

Weaponssmith - Relic 12 emeralds

Wandering trader - "disc 13", "disc 11" for 8 emeralds and "disc 5" for 16

 

That is all thank you! If you have any problems or questions leave it in comments. (;
